system.notes:
Abilities

  • Regeneration: If the monstrous vulture is alive, at the start of each Combat Turn it heals 3 damage. If its current damage is reduced to less than its Health, it immediately regains consciousness. If the monstrous vulture’s damage exceeds its Health x 2, it dies.
  • Swift: The monstrous vulture can take the Run action as a Minor Action, and the Move Action as a Free action (but can still only take each once per Combat Turn). The monstrous vulture does not suffer Liability on tests when they take the Run action. RADHOUND

Traits

  • Vision Enhancements: Low-Light, Thermographic
  • Elusive: Intercept attacks made against the monstrous
  • vulture suffer Liability.:
